title: Mastering font-display for Superior Web Font Performance & UX
tweet: 🚀 Elevate your #webfonts UX! Use `font-display: swap;` in @font-face to eliminate FOIT & ensure immediate content readability. A must for #CSStypography & #UIDesign. #FontPerformance
tip: To significantly enhance user experience, especially on slower connections, always include `font-display` within your `@font-face` declarations. Setting it to `swap` is often the best default, as it renders text immediately with a fallback font and swaps to the custom web font once loaded. This prevents the dreaded Flash of Invisible Text (FOIT), maintaining readability from the start and positively impacting Core Web Vitals.
